ab: Sndamac namu balay. Prading ta da ha.
en: Hello everyone. Here we go.

ab: Tutuy! Thmuku!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: Sndamac su balay mptusa.
en: B: Hello.

ab: Tlung.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: Sndamac namu balay. Diyax saya pa tsanun maku equn u hyaun nchaya rmngaw kari Sediq ka mptusa.
ch: 大家好。今天老師要教大家食物的賽德克語怎麼說。
en: Hello everyone. Today I am going to teach you how to say food in Sederik.

ab: Klaun su mbahang ka kari tnsanan mptusa hu?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: Mptusa, ini mu klayi. Malu su rmngaw mntxal dungan hu?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: Ini mu qbhangi, ya su malu tpuraq hari hu?
ch: B:我聽不到，您可以大聲一點嗎?
en: B: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: Qita hini! Snoli ku smpu txal.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: Malu bay ka snpuwan namu.
en: Everyone read it out very well.

ab: Spu txal dungan. Kbeyhing hari hnang.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: Mmlux. Iya squwaq.
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: Ngali ka patas namu.
en: A: Please take out your textbooks.

ab: Iyaq, mptusa.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Ngali ka impicu.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: Mptusa, cnhungi ku madas impicu da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: Ngali ka ssurus.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: Mptusa, cnhungi ku madas ssurus da.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: Usa knbarux ssurus ssiyaw su tnhiqan muyas.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: Kbrxi ku ssurus haw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: Malix ta muyas da.
en: Class is over.

ab: Muda hini ka ratuc snlhayan ta han, msturung ta babaw sngayan dungan.
ch: 我們就上到這邊，下週再見。
en: Class dismissed, see you next week.
